caption: The video features a man sitting in a radio studio, engaging in what appears to be a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black cap, headphones, and a black t-shirt with some text on it. The man is seated in front of a microphone, suggesting he is either hosting or participating in the show. The background includes a banner with the words "Unique Hustle" and stars, along with the show's branding prominently displayed. The setting is professional, with a focus on the man as he speaks, indicating an interactive and possibly informative discussion.
